text: {"claims":[{"statement":"For most people, an egg a day does not increase your risk of a heart attack, a stroke, or any other type of cardiovascular disease.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"For most people, an egg a day does not increase your risk of a heart attack, a stroke, or any other type of cardiovascular disease.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that consuming one egg per day does not raise the risk of heart attack, stroke, or other cardiovascular disease for most individuals.","population":"most people","intervention":"egg a day","comparator":"","outcome":"risk of heart attack, stroke, cardiovascular disease","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"The liver is stimulated to make cholesterol primarily by saturated fat and trans fat in our diet, not dietary cholesterol.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"The liver is stimulated to make cholesterol primarily by saturated fat and trans fat in our diet, not dietary cholesterol.","entailment":"The quoted sentence explains that saturated and trans fats, rather than dietary cholesterol, are the main dietary drivers of liver cholesterol production.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"cholesterol synthesis in the liver","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"A large egg contains little saturated fat - about 1.5 grams.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"A large egg contains little saturated fat - about 1.5 grams (g).","entailment":"The quoted sentence provides the specific amount of saturated fat present in a large egg, indicating it is a small quantity.","population":"large egg","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"saturated fat content","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"about 1.5 grams","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"One large egg also contains about 6 g of protein and 72 calories.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"One large egg also contains about 6 g of protein and 72 calories.","entailment":"The quoted sentence states the amounts of protein and calories that a large egg provides.","population":"large egg","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"protein and calorie content","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"about 6 g protein, 72 calories","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Eggs contain many healthy nutrients, including lutein and zeaxanthin, choline, and vitamins A, B, and D.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"Eggs also contain many healthy nutrients: lutein and zeaxanthin, which are good for the eyes; choline, which is good for the brain and nerves; and various vitamins (A, B, and D).","entailment":"The quoted sentence lists the nutrients found in eggs and their associated health benefits, defining the nutritional content of eggs.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"nutrient content and associated health benefits","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
